headline: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE): Strong Growth Stock With a Textbook Breakout Setup
summary: Find high-conviction trades by combining strong fundamentals with breakout technical setups. EXPE shows 41% EPS growth and a clean $270 breakout entry with tight 4.27% risk.

headline: Wedbush Assumes Expedia Group at Outperform, Announces Price Target of $334
summary: Wedbush  analyst Ygal Arounian   assumes Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $334.
